card.name: Liberated Dragon AKT
card.text: (Put a liberated card under this; this has its abilities, but not card types. This is single faced and can't be transformed.)

card.name: Insect Advisor AKT
card.text: Flying

card.name: Embraced Cards AKT
card.text: (Put your embraced cards here. They're in exile, and you may play them on a later turn that a source you control that shares a creature type with it dealt damage to an opponent.)

card.name: Recruit AKT
card.text: (This is the creature type chosen as it was created.)

card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.text: Flying

card.name: Horror EXPT
card.text: Decayed (This creature can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Shell's Scraping EXPT
card.text: Create two 1/1 silver Horror creature tokens with changeling. (They're every creature type.) This spell deals damage to any target equal to the number of tokens you control. You gain life equal to the damage dealt this way.

card.name: Distant Vulture EXPT
card.text: Flying, haste This creature has lifelink as long as it has power 2 or greater.

card.text: Decayed. (This creature can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Draft Archetypes FOE
card.text: {W}{U}: Flicker {U}{B}: Reanimator {B}{R}: Sacrifice {R}{G}: Landfall {G}{W}: Noncreature Spells {W}{B}: Enchantments {B}{G}: Graveyard Value {G}{U}: Human//Elf Typal {U}{R}: Noncreature Spells (CardAdv) {R}{W}: Go Wide {I}{W}: Tokens Go Wide Anthems {I}{U}: Same Name//Tokens {I}{B}: Sacrifice//Go Tall {I}{R}: Multi Luminous {I}{G}: Mirror//Tokens

card.name: Orb FOE
card.text: This creature can't block. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, target player mills two cards.

card.text: This creature can't block.

card.text: Vigilance

card.name: White Wurm Dragon FOE
card.text: Flying

card.name: Wurm Dragon FOE
card.text: (This is also a Kindred permanent.) This is also a creature if you've illuminated silver.

card.name: Illuminated black FOE
card.text: If you control four or more black permanents, you've illuminated black for the rest of the game.

card.name: Illuminated Blue FOE
card.text: If you control four or more blue permanents, you've illuminated blue for the rest of the game.

card.name: Illuminated Green FOE
card.text: If you control four or more green permanents, you've illuminated green for the rest of the game.

card.name: Illuminated Red FOE
card.text: If you control four or more red permanents, you've illuminated red for the rest of the game.

card.name: Illuminated Silver FOE
card.text: If you control four or more silver permanents, you've illuminated silver for the rest of the game.

card.name: Illuminated White FOE
card.text: If you control four or more white permanents, you've illuminated white for the rest of the game.

card.name: Orb Wizard FOE
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Counter target noncreature spell unless its controller pays {1}.

card.name: Luminous in All Colors FOE
card.text: If you control four or more permanents of the same color, you've illuminated that color for the rest of the game.

card.name: Jothi Token FOE
card.text: Flying When Jothi enters, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature. [+1]: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If it entered this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on it. [-4]: Create a token that's a copy of Jothi, except it's not legendary, doesn't enter with loyalty counters and is a 1/1 Bird creature with flying.

card.name: Food FOE
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Blood FOE
card.text: {1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.

card.name: Clue FOE
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.

card.name: Goat FOE
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes blocked, each opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: Jura FOE
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Law of Nature FOE
card.text: Ward {2} Creatures you control get +2/+2 and have haste, vigilance, and first strike.

card.name: Powerstone Shard FOE
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast a nonartifact spell.
card.reverse-related: I Will Walk My Own Path

card.name: Treasure FOE
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Dragon 34 FOE
card.text: Flying, vigilance

card.name: Geistwald Abomination HOD
card.text: Trample, reach When Geistwald Abomination dies, choose two names. For each chosen name, create a legendary 3/3 Knight creature token that is all colors with that name in your reserves. ({3}: Put up to three tokens from your reserves onto the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Roul Banefort, the Stern HOD
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, choose a name. Create a legendary 3/3 Knight creature token that's all colors with that name in your reserves. ({3}: Put up to three tokens from your reserves onto the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.) Whenever you attack with three or more other Knights, you may return target card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Terrel Battlemage HOD
card.text: {U}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Surveil 1, then draw a card. {R}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Choose a name. Create a legendary 3/3 Knight creature token that's all colors with that name. Activate only outside of combat.

card.name: Grasp of the Mirrorkin HOD
card.text: Counter target spell. That spell's controller chooses a name, then create a legendary 3/3 Knight creature token that's all colors with that name in their reserves. (They may pay {3} to put up to three tokens from their reserves onto the battlefield as a sorcery.)

card.name: Beacon of Greatness HOD
card.text: Choose one, then create a token with those characteristics, then create a 3/3 white Soldier creature token with defender. • Lover to All, a legendary 2/3 red Human Noble creature token with menace. • The Sword of Perle, a legendary 3/1 red Orc Soldier creature token with "This creature has first strike as long as it's attacking."

card.name: Standing Army HOD
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, create a 1/1 blue Scout creature tokens in your reserves. ({3}: Put up to three tokens from your reserves onto the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.) Exile three tokens from your reserves: Choose a name. Create a legendary 3/3 Knight creature token that's all colors with that name. It can't block this turn.

card.name: Dirt to Flesh HOD
card.text: At the beginning of each end step, if you attacked this turn, choose a name. Create a legendary 3/3 Knight creature token that's all colors with that name in your reserves. ({3}: Put up to three tokens from your reserves onto the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Sapner Decree HOD
card.text: Choose one. If you control a legendary creature or planeswalker, you may choose two instead. • Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. • Target player chooses a name, then creates a legendary 3/3 Knight creature token that's all colors with that name. • Exile target enchantment. You gain 3 life.

card.name: Terrel Decree HOD
card.text: Choose one. If you control a legendary creature or planeswalker, you may choose two instead. • Target player creates two 1/1 blue Scout creature tokens. Prevent all damage that would be dealt to them this turn. • Creatures target player controls get +2/+0 until end of turn. • Return target creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Vance Decree HOD
card.text: Choose one. If you control a legendary creature or planeswalker, you may choose two instead. • Target player creates two tapped Treasure tokens. • Target player discards two cards. • Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Glory on Bloodied Wings HOD
card.text: Flying, vigilance At the beginning of each end step, create a 1/1 blue Scout creature token if you've sacrificed a permanent this turn. If you've sacrificed three or more permanents this turn, instead choose a name. Create a legendary 3/3 Knight creature token that's all colors with that name.

card.name: Explore the Great Unknown HOD
card.text: Landfall – Whenever a land you control enters, you may mill three cards. Create a 1/1 blue Scout creature token if a creature card is milled this way. Create a Treasure token if a land card is milled this way. Create a Weapon token if a nonland, noncreature card is milled this way. (A Weapon token is an Equipment artifact token with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.)

card.name: Meeting of Powers HOD
card.text: Choose two names. For each name, create a legendary 3/3 Knight creature token that is all colors with that name. Plainscycling {2}, Swampcycling {2}, Forestcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains, Swamp, or Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Fleshborne Horror HOD
card.text: Whenever Fleshborne Horror becomes blocked by a creature, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life. {2}{B}, Discard Fleshborne Horror: Draw a card, then choose a name. Create a legendary 3/3 Knight creature token that's all colors with that name in your reserves. ({3}: Put up to three tokens from your reserves onto the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.)

card.name: King's Rock Warden HOD
card.text: Whenever King's Rock Warden enters, create a 1/1 blue Scout creature token, a Treasure token, and a Clue token. Sacrifice a token: Surveil 2.

card.name: Hexer's Cave HOD
card.text: When Hexer's Cave enters, create a Food token and a Clue token in your reserves. ({3}: Put up to three tokens from your reserves onto the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.) {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Intisuyu's Armies HOD
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token for each creature you control.

card.name: The Sword of Perle HOD
card.text: The Sword of Perle has first strike as long as it's attacking.

card.name: The Gentle Giant HOD
card.text: Vigilance

card.name: Vance's Claw HOD
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink

card.name: Lover to All HOD
card.text: Menace

card.name: The Diamond of the Nye HOD
card.text: The Diamond of the Nye can't be blocked.

card.name: The Occultist HOD
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: Reserves HOD
card.text: You put tokens that you create in your reserves here. They are not on the battlefield and don't trigger enter the battlefield abilities. {3}: Put up to three tokens from your reserves onto the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Knight all colors HOD
card.text: Knight is all colors.

card.name: Defender Soldier HOD
card.text: Defender

card.text: Lifelink

card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Equip {2}

card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.text: {2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Heir Tracking HOD
card.text: Use this to see how close you are to receiving your Heir!

card.name: Faerie Horror ITD
card.text: Flying This creature can't block.

card.name: Ringing Noise ITD
card.text: At the beginning of each opponents upkeep, for each creature they control, destroy that creature unless its controller pays {1}.

card.name: Illusion ITD
card.reverse-related: To Be Forgotten in a Dream

card.name: Nightmare ITD
card.text: Lifelink This creature can't block.

card.name: Everywhere ITD
card.text: This land has every basic land type.

card.name: Ancient Forerunner ITD
card.text: This creature has first strike as long as it's your turn. When this creature enters, it deals 1 damage to each opponent. It deals 2 damage instead if it has power 4 or greater.

card.name: Cloudscape Observer ITD
card.text: When this creature enters, return up to one target creature you don't control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Deepmind Oracle ITD
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, surveil X, where X is its power.

card.name: Emergent Anomaly ITD
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, tap up to one target creature.

card.name: Fracture of Divinity ITD
card.text: Vigilance Whenever an opponent casts a noncreature spell with mana value less than this creature's power, draw a card.

card.name: Lammasu, Dream-Stilled ITD
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Mechanised Hunter ITD
card.text: When this creature enters, you may put an artifact card with mana value X or less from your hand onto the battlefield, where X is this creature's power.

card.name: New-Life Acolyte ITD
card.text: Artifact spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. This effect can't reduce a spell's cost to less than 1.

card.name: Priest of Perfection ITD
card.text: Whenever you spend five or more mana to cast a spell, draw a card.

card.name: Shifting Silverscape ITD
card.text: Shifting Silverscape enters tapped if it isn't a creature. {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Insect ITD
card.text: Flying This creature can't block.

card.name: Desolation ITD
card.text: {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Scar PTN
card.text: (When this boon triggers, it disappears. Even if you didn't pay the {1}.) When a creature you control dies, you may pay {1}. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: God Horror PTN
card.text: This creature can't block.

card.name: Cleric PTN
card.text: Sacrifice two other Clerics: Transform this creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Foretell PTN
card.text: When a card becomes foretold its foretell cost is its mana cost if it doesn't have one. Lands can't have a cost and are played normally.

card.text: Flying

card.text: Deathtouch, toxic 1 (Players dealt combat damage by this creature also get a poison counter.)

card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add {R}.

card.text: This creature can't block.

card.name: White Base TZE-01
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Cleric TZE-01
card.text: As a sorcery, sacrifice two other Clerics: Transform into a 4/4 God Horror that can't block.

card.name: God Horror TZE-01
card.text: This creature can't block.

card.name: Gateway Guardian VNM
card.text: When this creature enters, trace its skill into your hand. (Create that card. Traces are cards that become copies when they enter public zones.) [b]Subdued Rift[/b] {WB}| Skill Sorcery Create a 1/1 black and white Cat enchantment creature token.

card.name: Avlod Bulwark VNM
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, trace its skill into your hand. (Create that card. Traces are cards that become copies when they enter public zones.) [b]Subdued Rift[/b] {WB}| Skill Sorcery Create a 1/1 black and white Cat enchantment creature token.

card.name: Voidstone Shard VNM
card.text: When this enchantment enters, scry 2.

card.name: Reformed Rift VNM
card.text: (Created by Raze the Clanless.) {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Subdued Rift VNM
card.text: Create a 1/1 black and white Cat enchantment creature token. (Traces are cards that become copies when they enter a public zone.)

card.name: Hollow Graze VNM
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-0 until end of turn. Cast only outside of combat. (Traces are cards that become copies when they enter a public zone.)

card.name: Ever Vigilant VNM
card.text: Target creature gains vigilance and can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less until end of turn. (Traces are cards that become copies when they enter a public zone.)

card.name: Steady Growth VNM
card.text: Enchant land Enchanted land has "{T}: Add one mana of any color."

card.name: Prepared Strike VNM
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. (Traces are cards that become copies when they enter a public zone.)

card.name: In the Moment VNM
card.text: Exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn. (Traces are cards that become copies when they enter a public zone.)
card.related: Can Be Cast From Exile EXPT

card.name: Reshape Will VNM
card.text: Tap target non-Aura enchantment. It also becomes a 3/3 creature. Cast this spell only outside of combat. (Traces are cards that become copies when they enter a public zone.)

card.name: Readied Assault VNM
card.text: Until end of turn, creatures you control get +1/+1 and can attack as though they didn't have defender. (Traces are cards that become copies when they enter a public zone.)

card.name: Military Training VNM
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Cast only outside of combat. (Traces are cards that become copies when they enter a public zone.)

card.name: White Drake VNM
card.text: Flying

card.name: Icebound Reinforcements Copy VNM
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. {1}{GU}{GU}, Remove three +1/+1 counters from this creature: Create a token that's a copy of this creature.

card.name: Luminous VNM
card.text: If you control four permanents of the same color, you've illuminated that color for the rest of the game.

card.name: Warped Exploration VNM
card.text: Trace a basic land of any type into your hand. (Create that card. Traces are cards that become copies when they enter public zones.)

card.name: Blue Drake VNM
card.text: Flying This creature can't block.

card.name: Harsh Reprise VNM
card.text: Each opponent loses 2 life. (Traces are cards that become copies when they enter a public zone.)

card.name: Cut from Void VNM
card.text: Scry 1, then draw a card. (Traces are cards that become copies when they enter a public zone.)

card.name: Sanctum Reminder VNM
card.text: Before the game starts, place your sanctum here face down. [b]This is not an ordered deck[/b]. You can look at your sanctum at any time. Your sanctum consists of up to seven basic land cards and unique nonbasic cards that can start in the sanctum. You can move cards in and out of your sanctum in sideboarding, provided that all the cards in it can start there.

card.name: Pathbound VNM
card.text: Pathbound cards in your sanctum count towards deck building costs when creating a starting deck. Each pathbound card in your sanctum must be unique. You may have only five pathbound cards in your sanctum at the beginning of the game.

card.name: Black Wurm VNM
card.text: Deathtouch

card.name: Green Wurm VNM
card.text: Reach

card.name: Red Wurm VNM
card.text: Haste

card.name: Trace Reminder VNM
card.text: Traces are copies of the spell that they traced in a non-public zone (Hand, Library, and Sanctum). When played or cast, they become tokens.

card.name: Dragon WAW
card.text: Flying

card.name: Memory of Home WAW
card.text: Whenever a creature you control dies, you may create an X/X black Spirit creature token that can't block, where X is its mana value. Do this only once on each of your turns.

card.name: Spirit Token WAW
card.text: This creature can't block.

card.name: Story of a Dead Plane WAW
card.text: This enchantment is all colors. Sacrifice this enchantment: Until end of turn, lands you control gain "{T}: Add one mana of any color."

card.name: Wonder Archon WAW
card.text: This creature is all colors.

card.name: New Tensuo Luminary WAW
card.text: Whenever another creature with base power 1 or less enters under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn. (This token's mana value is {W}.)

card.name: Lakebed Wrudge WAW
card.text: You may look at the top card of your library any time. As long as you control another permanent named Lakebed Wrudge, you may play lands and cast spells from the top of your library. {T}: Mill a card. (This token's mana cost is {1}{U}.)

card.name: Cloudeater Drake WAW
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, draw a card. (This token's mana cost is {2}{U}.)

card.name: Copy WAW
card.text: (This token can be used to represent a token that's a copy of a permanent.)

card.name: Demon WAW
card.text: Flying This creature can't block.

card.name: Flowering Germinus WAW
card.text: When Flowering Germinus enters, creatures you control with base power 1 or less get +1/+1 and gain vigilance until end of turn. (This token's mana cost is {1}{GW}{GW}.)

card.name: Gilded Ancient WAW
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, target creature gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of creatures you control. (This token's mana cost is {5}{G}.)

card.name: Ilcan Keyseeker WAW
card.text: When this creature enters, untap target creature and put a +1/+1 counter on it. If that creature is a Wonder, put an additional +1/+1 counter on it. (This token's mana cost is {1}{W}.)

card.name: Kindly Skywinder WAW
card.text: When this creature enters, target creature you control gains flying until end of turn. (This token's mana cost is {3}{W}.)

card.name: Music of the Deepholt WAW
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. (This token's mana cost is {2}{U}.)

card.name: New Tensuo Clergy WAW
card.text: Whenever this creature or another creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. (This token's mana cost is {2}{B}.)

card.name: New Tensuo Vanguard WAW
card.text: When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain first strike until end of turn. (This token's mana cost is {4}{W}.)

card.name: Wonder WAW
card.text: This creature is all colors.

card.name: Redefinition WAW
card.text: When this creature enters, up to one target creature's power and toughness each become equal to this creature's power and toughness until this creature leaves the battlefield. (This token's mana cost is {3}{U}.)

card.name: Stardust Haze WAW
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent you don't control until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. (This token's mana cost is {3}{W}.)

card.name: Ageless Caretaker WAW
card.text: During your turn, this creature has indestructible and vigilance. This creature gets +1/+0 for each other creature you control. (This token's mana cost is {4}{W}.)

card.name: New Tensuo Physician WAW
card.text: When this creature enters, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. If it was a land or multicolored card, you gain 5 life. (This token's mana cost is {4}{G}.)

card.name: Vrep WAW
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature. Augmented – At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you've spent {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} to cast spells this turn, put a number of +1/+1 counters on target creature equal to this creature's power. (This token's mana cost is {4}{G}.)
